title: M28 3GN, Adler & Allan Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/NP3234LD/V006
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Adler & Allan Limited Installation name: Worsley Waste Transfer Facility Permit number: EPR/NP3234LD/V006  "
